brief:
🌅 GOOD MORNING, MARIA — MONDAY BRIEF

⏰ THIS WEEK
• Tue: Health inspector visit at 10am (annual)
• Wed: $1,850 from Mission Cultural Center should land (they confirmed May 23)
• Sun: Q1 sales tax e-signature DUE by end of day — Jose needs it back

💰 MONEY
• 2 overdue invoices totaling $2,270 — I sent friendly nudges Friday, MCC replied with a hard pay date
• Tortilla prices go up 18% June 1 from Carlos. Two cheaper quotes in your inbox; I have a comparison ready
• Insurance renewal June 15 — $340 increase

🔥 ATTENTION
• 4 unreplied reviews (1 was 1-star) — I drafted replies, you just need to approve
• Patricia (landlord) wants a call this week re: lease. She's proposing $6,800/mo, up from $5,950

👋 PEOPLE
• Tanya from Balmy Alley wants to book 4 more summer dates — easy yes
• DJ Miguel: $1,200 final payment for Sofia's quince due May 30

✅ I HANDLED FOR YOU THIS WEEK
• Replied to 4 reviews (drafts in your inbox to approve)
• Sent invoice reminder to MCC and Balmy Alley
• Posted to Instagram Mon/Wed/Fri (you got 47 new followers)

One question: do you want to counter Patricia on the lease at $6,300, or take her $6,800 to lock in 3 years?

qa.what should i do first today|what should: Three things, Maria. First: Jose needs your e-signature on Q1 sales tax today — I put the link at the top of your inbox. Second: the health inspector is tomorrow at 10 — I made a checklist on the counter. Third: Patricia from the landlord called twice. Just text her back when you can.
qa.who owes me money|outstanding invoices|l: Two open invoices totaling $2,270. Mission Cultural Center owes $1,850 — they confirmed they'll pay May 23rd. Balmy Alley Tours owes $420 from April 28th, 6 days overdue. I sent a friendly nudge to Balmy this morning and they usually pay within a day.
qa.tortilla|supplier|carlos|switch supplier: Carlos is raising your tortilla price 18% June 1. You have two cheaper quotes in your inbox: Tortilleria Oaxaca at $0.36/unit (delivers Tue and Fri), and El Molino at $0.39 with daily free delivery. Oaxaca saves you about $180/month at your volume. I'd switch.
qa.reply.*2.*star|negative review|bad revie: Here's my draft: 'Brandon — running out of carne asada on a Saturday night is on us, not you. The tortillas should never feel stale either. Come back this week and your next plate is on me — text us at 415-555-0142 and ask for Maria.' Want me to post it?
qa.lease|landlord|patricia|rent: Patricia proposed $6,800/mo for a 3-year renewal, up from $5,950. That's a $850/mo jump or about $10k/year. Mission rents are up but I'd counter at $6,300 — that's roughly 6% which matches the market. Worst case she comes back at $6,500.
qa.quincea|sofia|dj miguel|quince: Sofia's quinceañera is September 12 at Galería de la Raza. DJ Miguel needs his final payment of $1,200 by May 30. Everything else is paid and confirmed.
qa.instagram|posts|social media: You haven't posted in 6 weeks. I drafted three for this week — Monday on your salsa verde, Wednesday on regulars, Friday on tortillas — and queued them up. Just hit approve.
qa.default: Maria, I have your inbox, your calendar, and every review open. Give me a little more — like 'what's due this week' or 'who owes me money' or 'should I switch tortilla suppliers' — and I'll answer in 10 seconds.
